falsifier: The adjudicated arm no longer separates the contaminated/raw lane from the safe lane under the documented fixture conditions.
threat_model_scope: Preregistered local fixture with bounded contamination conditions; not a broad cloud-memory quality claim.
public_note: Useful contamination methodology artifact kept as supportive evidence, not promoted as a general memory benchmark.
claim_boundary: Fixture claim with preregistered controls, baselines and falsifiers; not a universal model-quality result.
